allow: PowerShell($start = [DateTimeOffset]::new\(2026,5,15,20,34,00,[TimeSpan]::FromHours\(-4\)\).ToUnixTimeMilliseconds\(\); $end = [DateTimeOffset]::new\(2026,5,15,20,35,30,[TimeSpan]::FromHours\(-4\)\).ToUnixTimeMilliseconds\(\); aws logs filter-log-events --log-group-name /aws/lambda/jaetill-portal-invite --region us-east-2 --start-time $start --end-time $end --output json | ConvertFrom-Json | Select-Object -ExpandProperty events | ForEach-Object { $_.message.TrimEnd\(\) } | Where-Object { $_ -notmatch '^\(START|END|REPORT|INIT\)' })
